summary: Cache the long-lived studio cookies independently of the JWT; drop the rotating __session*; re-pull from the browser only when missing or on a 422 token_validation_failed.
reason: Part A coupled the cookie cache to the JWT (cleared cookies on every 60-minute re-mint), causing an hourly Chrome read though the suno.com cookies are valid for months. Verified against the live API that POST /api/feed/v3 returns 200 with __session* stripped, so the WAF does not require the rotating cookie. Now: __session* is excluded from the cache; SaveSunoSession no longer clears cookies on re-mint; cookies are cached indefinitely and re-pulled only when the header is empty or the server rejects them as stale (422 token_validation_failed -> RefreshStudioCookies + one retry).
